full_text:
Huanglong [Yellow Dragon] 黃龍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huanglong [Yellow Dragon] (黃龍). A Black Mountain Bandit operating north of the Yellow River. Killed by Yuan Shao. Huanglong [Yellow Dragon] was a bandit Huanglong [Yellow Dragon] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
